abilities: PASSIVE ABILITY. Under a Yellow Sun. Superman must be targeted thrice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Non-Human Shield. Superman may shield one other player from elimination (Protect!).
SUPER ABILITY. Heat Vision. Superman accuses one player of being Martian (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. X-Ray Vision.  Superman targets one player. Watchtower must reveal if that player is Martian. (Inspect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Amazonian Fortitude. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Lasso of Truth. Wonder Woman targets one other player. Watchtower must tell Wonder Woman if that player is a White Martian. (Inspect!)
SUPER ABILITY. Bulletproof Bracelets. Player may declare identity of all White Martians. (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. World's Greatest Detective. Player only shuts their eyes during Eliminate! phase. Batman cannot communicate via Telepathic Link.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Because I'm Batman. Batman must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Billionaire Playboy. Batman may lie to any Accuser once, unless that player is The Riddler. (Accuse!)
batman.strategy: STRATEGY: Get Civilians into Watchtower. Confuse Villains..

abilities: PASSIVE ABILITY. Run for Your Life. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY: Fastest Man Alive. Target one player. Player switches seats with target. (Protect!)
SUPER ABILITY. Altering the Timeline. Player may cancel results of previous Vote! Phase, and initiate new Vote! Phase. (Rescue!)
the_flash.strategy: STRATEGY: Keep White Martians out of the Watchtower. Protect Civilians from elimination.

abilities: PASSIVE ABILITY. Force Field. Green Lantern must be targeted twice for elimination.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Green Lantern’s Light. Each target beside player is shielded until player is moved/eliminated.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Flight. Targets one player. Player and target are immediately Rescued (MOGO). (Rescue!)
SUPER ABILITY. Construct. Player may create one new rule that all players must follow until end of game. (Discuss!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Static Shield. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Spark the Flame. Player may accuse one other player of being Martian. If that player is Martian (Green or White) that player is now Exposed!
SUPER ABILITY. Super Volt. Up to two targets to players right and up to two targets on player’s right must self identify (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Earth's Mightiest Mortal. Captain Marvel must be targeted three times for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Shazam!. Captain Marvel must answer 'No' to any accusation. Player’s answer is always treated as true. (Accuse!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Human Shield. Captain Marvel may shield one other player. (Protect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Alien Telepath. Player knows the identity of all White Martians.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Telepathic Link. Target one player. Player must self-identify to target. Target must then signal their role to player (10s). (Inspect!)
SUPER ABILITY. Telepathic Team. Player may signal Watchtower to reveal Telepathically Linked characters to each other. (Inspect!)
martian_manhunter.strategy: STRATEGY: Reveal Heroes/White Martians to Heroes.

abilities: PASSIVE ABILITY. Vibe the Future. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Not Today Satan. Pick a number 0-10. Choose a color R-V. Player moves to that zone. (Rescue!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. My Plus One. Pick a number 0-10. Choose a color R-V. Target one player. Player and target move to that zone. (Rescue! phase only)
SUPER ABILITY. Vibe the Multiverse. Player may check Zone grid (10s). (Inspect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Protect The Green. Player is treated as a Safe Zone!
ACTIVE ABILITY. Welcome to The Green. Target one player. Player is now Rescued! (The Green) (Rescue!)
SMPTHINGER ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Cigam Dleihs. Player may shield self or another player. (Protect!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Yllis Tibbar. Target one player. Target is now a rabbit. Target cannot act for one round. (Inspect!)
SUPER ABILITY. Thgiels fo Dnah. Player may look at Secret Identity sheet (10s). (Inspect!)
SUPER ABILITY. Won Ouy Ees Em… Player may teleport self to any zone. (Rescue!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Reincarnation. If Eliminated, player returns to game after one round.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Nth Metal Mace. At start of Accuse! phase, target one player. Target cannot Accuse! this phase.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Nth Metal Harness - Can move self plus one  target to Thanagar.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Timeless Love. During Inspect phase, target one player. If that player is Kendra Saunders, that player is now HAWKWOMAN.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Back from Beyond… The 1st eliminated Civilian/Bystander receives this card.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Human Host. Spectre must be targeted twice for elimination.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Spirit of Vengeance. Player knows identities of all Martians and Villains. (Report!)
SUPER ABILITY. Divine Retribution. Target one player. That player is eliminated. (Eliminate!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Malleable Mind. Player cannot be eliminated (White Martians).
ACTIVE ABILITY. Master of Disguise. Player cannot be targeted this round.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Group Hug. Player may shield two players to the left or to the right.
SUPER ABILITY. Petty Thief. Player may look at Secret Identity roster (10s).
PASSIVE ABILITY. Time Traveller. Knows identity of all heroes.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Power Suit. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Legion Flight Ring. Target one player. Player and target move to any zone. (Rescue!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Gloryhound. May accuse one player of being TYPE - Hero. If correct, gains 3 protects this round. (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trusted Ally. Luthor knows identity of LACKEY.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Kryptonite. Target one player. Player accuses target of being Superman.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trusted Ally. Luthor knows identity of LACKEY.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Kryptonite. Target one player. Player accuses target of being Superman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Fastest Menace Alive. Target one player. Player takes target hostage (The Flash). (Accuse!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Not So Fast. Target a player targeted-for-teleportation. Player switches seats with target. Player teleports to Watchtower instead. (start/Rescue!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Riddle Me This. Player must answer all questions directed to them with a question.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Who’s Afraid of the Big Black Bat? Player may accuse one player of being Batman. (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Albino. Player must self-identify at start of game. (Discuss!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Harpoon. Target one player. Player takes target hostage (Black Lightning). (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. The Main Man. If Lobo exposes any combination of three Civilians, Heroes, or Martians then Lobo wins the game.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Expert Tracker. Once per round Main Man can accuse one player of being a specific type.
SUPER ABILITY. Space Hog.  Player may move to any zone. (Rescue!)
lobo.strategy: STRATEGY: Expose a Hero, Martian, or Civilian.

abilities: ACTIVE ABILITY. I Smell Power. Target any player. Player accuses target of being specific character. (Accuse!)

ACTIVE ABILITY. Absorption. Parasite targets an exposed or self-identified player. That player must give their card to Parasite. Parasite now has access to all abilities listed on that player’s card. (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trusted Ally. Players knows identity of Luthor.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Collecting Intel. Player may lie during Telepathic Link/Telepathic Team.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Loyal Assistant. Initiate an Accuse phase. Target one player. Identify target using target’s signal. (Discuss!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trusted Ally. Players knows identity of Luthor.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Collecting Intel. Player may lie during Telepathic Link/Telepathic Team.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Loyal Assistant. Initiate an Accuse phase. Target one player. Identify target using target’s signal. (Discuss!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Collecting Intel. Player may lie during Telepathic Link/Telepathic Team.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trusted Ally. Players knows identity of Luthor.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Bodyguard. If Luthor is targeted for Watchtower, player may take Luthor’s place. (Rescue!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Heir to Krypton. For every Kryptonian in play (Superman/boy/girl, Krypto, Doomsday etc.) Zod gains one target. (Vote!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Kneel Before Zod. Target one player. Target must vote the same as Zod or be eliminated. (Vote!) *same-zone only
SUPER ABILITY. Interstellar Flight. Player may move to any zone. (Rescue!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Got Your Scent. Target one player. Player may accuse target of being Steve Trevor. If player is correct, takes target hostage (Wonder Woman). (Accuse!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
SUPER ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. One Down. Target one player. Player takes target hostage (Batman). (10s).
ACTIVE ABILITY. Mad Love. Target one player. Player accuses target of being Dr. Harleen Quinzel. (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Agent of Fear. Target a player. Player takes target hostage (Green Lantern). (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. Construct. Start an additional Accuse! phase this round. (Rescue!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Earth's Mightiest Menace. Target one player. Player takes target hostage (Captain Marvel). (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. Steal Your Thunder. Target Mary Marvel or Captain Marvel Jr. Target reverts to TYPE: Civilian and is no longer Rescued. (Accuse!) *same-zone only
PASSIVE ABILITY. Speed Thief. For every speedster in play (Flash, K. Flash, R. Flash, Jesse Quick) Zoom gains one hostage. (Accuse!) *same-zone only
ACTIVE ABILITY. Fastest Menace Alive. Target a player. Take player hostage (The Flash). (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. For Krypton. For every Kryptonian in play (Superman, Krypto, Doomsday etc.) player gains one target. (Accuse!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Brutal. Target one player. Take that player hostage (any Kryptonian). (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. Interstellar Flight. Player may move to any zone. (Rescue!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Hostile Takeover. Target one player. Player must vote the same as Grodd. (Vote!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
SUPER ABILITY. Mind Scramble/Scrambled Heads. All players in same zone as Grodd must exchange cards twice. *Excludes Grodd
PASSIVE ABILITY. Weigh the Odds. Roulette counts as three separate players. (Discuss!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Play the Odds. Roulette counts as five separate players. (Vote!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. Make A Deal. Target one player. Roulette and that player must leave the room (30s). (Discuss!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. 5th Dimensional Fan. Player knows identity of Superman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Hiya Supes!. Player may Expose! Superman. (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. Up, Up and Let’s Play. When Superman is Exposed, player must restore all abilities to Superman and create a rule that specifically hinders Superman. (Report!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. My Hero!. Bat-Mite knows identity of Batman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Hi Batman!. Player may Expose! Batman. (Accuse!)
SUPER ABILITY. The Dark Mite Returns. When Batman is Exposed, Bat-Mite must restore all abilities to Batman and create a rule that specifically helps Batman. (Report!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Knowledge is Power. Player knows identity of all Bystanders.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Alchemy Stone. Target any player. Change that player to TYPE: Protector (I) or TYPE: Eliminator (II). (Inspect!) *same-zone only
SUPER ABILITY. Blackout. Change current phase to an Eliminate! phase.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Family Ties. Player knows identity of Wonder Woman.
PASSIVE ABILITY. War Everlasting. If eliminated, player becomes active at end of next round. (Report!)
SUPER ABILITY. Join Me... Expose Wonder Woman. Wonder Woman is auto-shielded each round if target votes the same as player. (Vote!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Never Give Up. If eliminated, player becomes active at end of next round (Report!).
PASSIVE ABILITY. Interplanetary Obsession. Player knows identity of Superman.
SUPER ABILITY. Join Me... Expose Superman. Superman is auto-shielded each round if Superman votes same as player. (Vote!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Immortal. If eliminated, player becomes active at end of next round.
ACTIVE ABILITY. The Wheel of Fate. Knows identity of Kendra Saunders.
SUPER ABILITY. Join Me… Expose Kendra Saunders. Kendra Saunders is auto-shielded each round if target Votes same as player.(Vote!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Lazarus Pit. If eliminated, player becomes active at end of next round.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Well done, Detective. Player knows identity of Batman.
SUPER ABILITY. Join Me… Expose Batman. Batman is auto-shielded this round if Batman votes same as player.
PASSIVE ABILITY. No Voice of My Own. Player cannot Discuss or Accuse.
PASSIVE ABILITY. But It’s Just A Starfish! If player conquers four players, player wins the game.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Interstellar Conqueror. Target one player. Signal target. Target cannot Discuss, Accuse, or Eliminate and must physically mimic player until player is removed.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Female Fury. Target up to 3 players. Signal each target. Targets are now Furies. (Inspect!)
ACTIVE ABILITY. ‘‘Granny Says’’. Target a Fury. Give Fury a verbal command. Fury must comply. **same-zone only
SUPER ABILITY. Granny Knows. Player checks Secret Identity page. (Inspect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Mute. Doomsday cannot Discuss, or Accuse.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Adaptive Survival. Doomsday, targeted once for elimination, and targeted once for teleportation in order to be removed from game.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Weapon of Mass Destruction. Doomsday targets any player. Target is eliminated regardless of passive ability.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Lord of Apokolips. Player must be targeted three times for elimination.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Boom Tube. Player must be targeted twice times for teleportation (Apokolips).
PASSIVE ABILITY. Kneel. If player is among final four players, player wins the game.
SUPER ABILITY. Omega Effect. Target one player. Target is Eliminated! regardless of passive ability. (Report!)
SUPER ABILITY. Anti-Life Equation. Darkseid targets one player. That player must vote the same as Darkseid or that player is Eliminated regardless of passive ability. (Vote!)
SUPER ABILITY. Omega Beams. Target a player targeted for teleportation. That player is teleported to Apokolips. (Rescue!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Merely A Facsimile. Player must be targeted three times for elimination.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Skull Ship. Player ignores zone conditions.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Catalogue the Universe. Pick a number 0-10. Pick a color R-V. Zone and occupants are eliminated regardless of passive ability. (Report!)
SUPER ABILITY. To Preserve Krypton. Target any zone which includes a Kryptonian player. All occupants within are eliminated unless Kryptonian player removes self from game.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Grounded. Player must be targeted twice for teleportation.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Under My Sway. Target one player. Target must Vote! same as player or target is Exposed! (Vote!)
SUPER ABILITY. Seeds of Change. Target one player. Whichever zone that player occupies is now Type: Danger! (Report!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows identity of Superman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Intrepid Reporter. Target one player. Accuse target of being White Martian (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows identity of Superman.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Superman's Pal. If player is eliminated, Superman loses shield ability for rest of game.
PASSIVE ABILITY. I’m in Charge. Player knows the identity of all civilians.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Taking One for the Team. Player must answer 'Yes' to their FIRST accusation.
PASSIVE ABILITY. I’m in Charge. Player knows the identity of all Civilians.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Taking One for the Team. Player must answer 'Yes' to their FIRST accusation.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows identity of Wonder Woman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Dying Breath.  If Steve Trevor is eliminated, target one player. Player accuses target of being a White Martian. (Report!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows the identity of The Flash.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Intrepid Reporter. Target one player. Accuse target of being White Martian (Accuse!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Investigator knows the identity of The Flash.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Citizen’s Arrest. Target one player. Target cannot Discuss!, Vote!, or Accuse! for one round.(Inspect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows identity of Batman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
APENNYWORTHER ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Know You Anywhere. Player knows identity of Batman.
ACTIVE ABILITY. A Good Doctor. Target one player. Player regains consciousness. (Report!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trust Your Gut. Player knows identity of all Villains.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Citizen’s Arrest. Target one player. Target cannot Discuss!, Vote!, or Accuse! for one round. (Inspect!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. Trust Your Gut. Player knows identity of all Villains.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Citizen’s Arrest. Target one player. (Inspect!) Target cannot Discuss!, Vote!, or Accuse! for one round.
MSAWYERER ABILITY. Name. Description. (Phase!)
PASSIVE ABILITY. All In The Family. Players knows identity of Captain Marvel.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Family Ties. Player may lie for Captain Marvel. *Type: Civilian only
PASSIVE ABILITY. Earth’s Mightiest Mortals. Player must be targeted thrice for elimination. **Type: Hero only.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Human Shield. Target one player. Player is shielded from elimination (Protect!) **Type: Hero only
SUPER ABILITY. Shazam! Shout “Shazam!” Mary Marvel/Freddie Freeman is now Rescued. Player must self-identify as MARY MARVEL or CAPTAIN MARVEL JR. (Discuss!)  **TYPE: Hero only.
PASSIVE ABILITY. All In The Family. Players knows identity of Captain Marvel.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Family Ties. Player may lie for Captain Marvel. *Type: Civilian only
PASSIVE ABILITY. Earth’s Mightiest Mortals. Player must be targeted thrice for elimination. **Type: Hero only.
ACTIVE ABILITY. Human Shield. Target one player. Player is shielded from elimination (Protect!) **Type: Hero only
SUPER ABILITY. Shazam! Shout “Shazam!” Mary Marvel/Freddie Freeman is now Rescued. Player must self-identify as MARY MARVEL or CAPTAIN MARVEL JR. (Discuss!)  TYPE: Hero.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Jefferson? Player knows the identity of Jax.
PASSIVE ABILITY. Shared Pain. Player must be targeted twice for elimination.
ACTIVE ABILITY. “Firestorm!”  High-five Jax. (Discuss!) *Professor Martin Stein is now Rescued. **Player is now Type: Hero. ***Player must act in-unison.
SUPER ABILITY. Transmutation (I). Firestorm may change any rule in the game. All players must follow new rule until end of game. (Discuss!) **This ability only works in-unison.
SUPER ABILITY. The Heat is On (II). The three players to your right must self-identify. (Accuse!) **This ability only works in-unison.
SUPER ABILITY. Blast Off (III). Target one player. Firestorm and target may move to any zone. (Rescue!) **This ability only works in-unison.
martin_stein.strategy: STRATEGY: Get into Watchtower/Get Civilians to Watchtower.
